channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump flies partway home from Turkey in an old Air Force One
item.description: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: ICE agents shot and killed a Houston man during a traffic stop. Here's what we know
item.description: Family and immigration advocate organizations are calling for a full and independent investigation into a shooting in which ICE agents shot and killed a Houston man during a traffic stop.
item.content:encoded: Family and immigration advocate organizations are calling for a full and independent investigation into a shooting in which ICE agents shot and killed a Houston man during a traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Bianca Seward

item.title: Ohio entrepreneur wants to bring 'farm-to-table' concept to clothing industry
item.description: The farm-to-table movement has been around for decades. An Ohio entrepreneur wants to replicate its success with clothing by building a regional textile economy.
item.content:encoded: The farm-to-table movement has been around for decades. An Ohio entrepreneur wants to replicate its success with clothing by building a regional textile economy.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Pirani

item.title: Why the death of MS student-athlete Nolan Wells is capturing national attention
item.description: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks to Anita Lee, reporter for the Sun Herald, about the growing national attention in the case Nolan Wells, a teenager found dead off of Mississippi's gulf coast.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks to Anita Lee, reporter for the Sun Herald, about the growing national attention in the case Nolan Wells, a teenager found dead off of Mississippi's gulf coast.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Hodges

item.title: Should you sign your kids up for Trump Accounts? Four things to consider
item.description: Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.
item.content:encoded:
Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.

(Image credit: TIMOTHY A. CLARY)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal how their books add to their income
item.description: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Appeals court denies Trump's request to halt removal of his name from the Kennedy Center
item.description: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.
item.content:encoded:
The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.

(Image credit: Alex Wroblewski)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: What we know about Nolan Wells, the student-athlete found dead off the coast of Mississippi
item.description: The Jackson County Sheriff's Office said the investigation remains "active and ongoing" and is asking for photos and videos from the northwest part of Horn Island on July 4, where Wells' body was found.
item.content:encoded:
The Jackson County Sheriff's Office said the investigation remains "active and ongoing" and is asking for photos and videos from the northwest part of Horn Island on July 4, where Wells' body was found.

(Image credit: Jackson County Sheriff's Office)
item.dc:creator: Elise Gregg

item.title: Inspiration for Trump's arch was sparked long before the design was first approved
item.description: The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.
item.content:encoded:
The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.

(Image credit: Harrison Design)
item.dc:creator: Chiara Eisner

item.title: Do you know where your birth certificate is? Journalist warns of new voting barriers
item.description: The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting."
item.content:encoded:
The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting."

(Image credit: Mike Stewart)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley
